title: Create: More Mixing
body:
Ever felt like there just isn't enough mixing recipes  in the base create mod? Ever wanted to bloat your game for absolutely no reason? Ever wanted to _suffer_? Then this is the mod for you! Enjoy such recipes as:
- Grass block
- Mycelium
- Diamonds (probably needs balance changes)

Features:
- More mixing recipes.

Planned features:
- A new biome so you can get charcoal and a new wood type (ember).


<details>
<summary>Don't read before playing the mod (spoilers my boi)</summary>

**DIAMOND ORE REQUIRES STEEL, NOT DIAMOND (JADE IS WEIRD)**

Enjoy the extra tedium :)

I might make a wiki for this soon.

Please suggest anything I could do to make this game more hellish please :3

Bad features:
- Coal ore drops coal chunklettes.
- Torches use a chunk for crafting instead of a full coal.
- Smelting wood in a furnace gives you ash instead of charcoal.
- Coal now generates in The Nether.
- Zombies have random HP, movement speed, and attack damage.
- Skeletons have random HP, and movement speed.
- Creepers have a lower fuse time and a larger explosion radius.
- Creepers get faster when closer to their target.
- Ghasts spawn more frequently.
- Blazes spawn in large groups in basalt deltas (like anyone goes there anyway).
- Scrap finders (right click tells you if it works on a block).
- Coal clubs (they have increased knockback).
- Have fun making ender eyes (might be tweaked).

Planned bad features:
- More advancements.
- Ghasts fire faster and have a longer "sight range".
- Raw iron smelts into iron nuggets (being considered, not confirmed).

BTW, I am not making diamonds worse, as I like how satisfying they are to find. I don't want to ruin that.

</details>
